title: Flying Witch Petit Special
titleNative: ふらいんぐうぃっち ぷち BD&DVD Vol.1 発売記念編
synonyms: Flying Witch Petit - BD & DVD Vol. 1 Launch Special
synopsis: To commemorate the anime Flying Witch, the first volume of the Blu-ray/DVD release included a special episode of Flying Witch Petit.

title: Welcome, Chitose
titleNative: おこしやす、ちとせちゃん
synopsis: The "soothing short" manga follows Chitose, a fluffy Emperor penguin chick living in Kyoto. The stories depict such familiar Kyoto locales as Togetsu-kyo bridge, Arashiyama Bamboo Grove, Fushimi Inari-taisha shrine, and Kiyomizu-dera temple from a penguin's perspective, as well as Kyoto cuisine. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: HIGH SCORE

title: Kantoku Fuyuki Todoki
titleNative: 監督不行届
synopsis: This is the anime adaptation of Kantoku Fuyuki Todoki (Insufficient Direction), the first essay manga by the "queen of the manga world," Moyoco Anno. The comedic and heartwarming autobiographical story follows her everyday married "otaku lifestyle" with Hideaki Anno, "the founder of the otaku cult." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kaze no Shoujo Emily
titleNative: 風の少女エミリー
synopsis: Based on the Emily of New Moon novel by Lucy Maud Montgomery. Emily is an orphan who gets sent to live with her relatives on Prince Edward Island, after her father dies. In New Moon she lives with her Aunt Elizabeth, Aunt Laura, and Cousin Jimmy, and learns to adapt with the help of her imagination and new friends. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: もも子、かえるの歌がきこえるよ

title: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party
titleRomaji: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party
titleNative: ラブライブ！蓮ノ空女学院スクールアイドルクラブ Bloom Garden Party
synopsis: The Bloom Garden Party is finally here. It’s the stage where everyone will “someday, surely” bloom—the goal Kaho and the others have been chasing for a whole year. This is the first step. The long-awaited day has finally arrived — the day when the promise they made with the graduates will come true. It was also the last day for the 103rd-year students, on the verge of graduation, could spend with their friends as students of Hasunosora. ―Even so, the girls race through their “youth” with all their might. This is the story of girls who struggled to bloom, a tale of dreams made real together. (Source: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party Site, translated)

titleNative: 北へ。 ～Diamond Dust Drops～

title: Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru Churutto!
titleRomaji: Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru Churutto!
titleNative: 結城友奈は勇者である ちゅるっと！
synopsis: It is the year 300 of the Divine Era. The world inside the Shinju where all Heroes and Mikos were summoned from all ages during the crisis of the Shinju. They gathered in Sanshuu Middle School Hero Club and have transformed it into a large family with a total of 27 members. The club president, Inubouzaki Fuu who gathered these powerful friends together, announces the development of the long-awaited Hero Club Udon.

titleNative: FX戦士くるみちゃん
synopsis: A story about the slightly dangerous(!?) investment activities of three soft and fluffy JDs! Every time the chart moves by 1mm in the wrong direction, I can feel the tears overflowing! A heart-stopping college-girl FX-trading comic for all those who want to have fun and make money! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: a piece of PHANTASMAGORIA
titleNative: a piece of PHANTASMAGORIA
synopsis: While traveling the realm of dreams, I discovered a small planet, Phantasmagoria... Life on the Glassy Ocean, a snowman's journey to the south, and the day that the giant lightbulb finally shone. Whispers of a great meteor, the confessions of a planetarium technician, and experiments to raise an artificial moon. Short stories that unearth transparent moments like crystals — a fusion of the fantastical world illustrated by Tamura Shigeru and the ambient music of Teshikai Utollo. (Source: Bandai, translated)

title: Omoi no Kakera
titleNative: 想いのかけら
synopsis: Hina Satou is a 13-year-old who loves figure skating and lives in a port town in Miyagi Prefecture. After losing her mother in the 2011 earthquake, she and her father are currently living in temporary housing. With sad memories of the earthquake and memories of a gentle mother, the cheerful Hina continues to move toward her dreams. (Source: Fukushima Gainax)
